examples: The system cauld be easily prepared at the laboratory for enantioseparation.
It cauld also help nervous men calculate when to avoid the ultimate commitment.
It was found that in the experiment for micronucleus of polychromatic erythrocyte (PCE) and lymphocyte cauld give similar results.
But house or hald, To thole the winter's sleety dribble, An cranreuch cauld!
